channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Unpicked litter Arnold Estate 4 days, 13th July
item.description:
Unpicked litter near communal area bin area 4 days. Service Level.Agreement (SLA) requires 'Daily Cleaning to Grade A Standard'. Please note from photo dates that same litter - blue plastic panel present now for 4 days. Please clean estate as per SLA.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pillow, Cardboard, food dumped corner Wheathill and Penge Rd, 13th July
item.description:
Cardboard, pillow, food dumped, plus bottles, etc added to, dumped on footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wheathill Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with no tax or MOT dumped opposite 43 Wrottesley Road for ages, 13th July
item.description:
Look at it - it’s clearly abandoned. No tax, no MOT. Same guy who dumps cars all over the area. Photos taken 13th July 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wrottesley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress has been there for some days, 13th July
item.description:
Mattress still there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edington Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Developing ditch and pothole with a cracked rectangle next to it., 13th July
item.description:
This pothole and sinking of the road which is developing, creates a loud bang and shacking of the houses when a bus passes over it. Slowly getting worse as the sinking is becoming deeper which is hard to see via the photo. About 11 months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Days Lane, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped road signs and car seat, 13th July
item.description:
Dumped road signs and car seat

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rattray Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severely overhanging hedge is safer risk, 13th July
item.description:
Pedestrians forced to walk on the road to pass each other due to severely overhanging bush blocking the footpath at a dangerous pinch point. Vehicles drive close by due to a crossing. The hedge must be trimmed to property line to avoid an accident

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southgate Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish bag 1 week, 13th July
item.description:
Flytipped rubbish bag has been there for over a week with surrounding litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rattray Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering and flytipping, 13th July
item.description:
This metal black box attracts lots of litter. Could it be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rattray Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter bins haven't been emptied in last 3 days including weekends., 13th July
item.description:
The litter bin in and around the children's play area haven't been emptied in last 3 days. It's favorite spot for people in the neighborhing areas. They come, litter and go and then bins are not emptied for days while the litter spreads in the park and play area and kids play in the litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Drive, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chronic flytipping, 13th July
item.description:
There is a chronic issue of flytipping along the entire length of the street. It is relentless. The residents of n75 are constantly leaving large and small items outside their property. Please investigate. Similarly, at the end of the road. Many items are dumped by the beautician store on Brodlove lane. Please investigate. It is a shocking amount of rubbish dumped daily.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car on Elmwood Drive, 13th July
item.description:
Jaguar car with no licence plates has been abandoned for over six months on Elmwood Drive, near the junction of Bridgen Road. It is in a parking bay that is council owned on the pavement. The car is in disrepair and has not moved from that space in over six months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Elmwood Drive, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Church illegal sign on lamp post, 13th July
item.description:
Church in Eastcote road have put up another illegal come preach with us sign having had one removed earlier in the year.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large graffiti writing on the wall facing Dunton Road SE1 (next to the number 78 bus stop), 13th July
item.description:
Large white graffiti on the public wall facing Dunton Road SE1

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Keats Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive graffiti on wall, 13th July
item.description:
Our street is in decline, and this huge graffiti probably happened due to the mental health centre located opposite. It is very unsightly and upsetting. Please remove it. Please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pique Mews, Shadwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti all over hoardings, 13th July
item.description:
Blue hoardings covered in graffiti
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Bellegrove Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th July
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped a table and stools outside our building. It's been here for a few days.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overgrown, 13th July
item.description:
Trees on the left hand side from the top of Kidbrooke park road down to the BP garage are overgrown. Some are hanging over to the road and are so low you have to duck or walk in road. Some are making and have made walls collapse. These all need cutting right back. The pathway needs a good sweep as well. As lots of dead leaves and litter
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Park Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood or something dumped on the grass, 13th July
item.description:
Junk dumped on the grass area next to a tree
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Road, Mottingham, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items dumped., 13th July
item.description:
There is fly‑tipping and overflowing waste at this location. Several bins are full and household items have been dumped around them, blocking part of the sidewalk. The rubbish is creating a hygiene issue and may attract pests. I have a photo showing this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Graham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
